content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(5, 7, 1), (0, 8, 2), (1, 8, 2), (0, 1, 3), (1, 4, 3), (6, 7, 3), (8, 9, 5), (4, 8, 10), (5, 9, 11), (1, 7, 13), (2, 6, 14), (4, 7, 14), (2, 7, 16), (5, 8, 17), (6, 8, 19)]

We need to find the nodes linked with node 8 exactly at time 10.

We scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (5, 7, 1) has node 5 and time 1. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 8, 2) has node 0 and time 2. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 8, 2) has node 1 and time 2. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 1, 3) has node 0 and time 3. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (1, 4, 3) has node 1 and time 3. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (6, 7, 3) has node 6 and time 3. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (8, 9, 5) has node 8 and time 5. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 8, 10) has node 4 and time 10. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (5, 9, 11) has node 5 and time 11. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 7, 13) has node 1 and time 13. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (2, 6, 14) has node 2 and time 14. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (4, 7, 14) has node 4 and time 14. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (2, 7, 16) has node 2 and time 16. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (5, 8, 17) has node 5 and time 17. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (6, 8, 19) has node 6 and time 19. -> Add node 8.

The nodes matched are 7, 8, 9, 17, and 19.

Answer: [7, 8, 9, 17, 19]
